name: backend-architect
purpose: Backend system architecture and API design specialist covering RESTful APIs, microservice boundaries, database schemas, scalability planning, and performance optimization.
sanitize_fields: description (SoNash Cloud Functions / Firestore / Zod references in example block)
body (example block references sonash-specific patterns: security-wrapper.ts, App Check, httpsCallable)
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field — non-standard YAML key not in SCHEMA_SPEC Section 3B. Example block is SoNash-specific (Cloud Functions, Firestore, security-wrapper.ts). No disallowedTools, color, or maxTurns fields. Tools include Write and Edit — can modify files.

name: code-reviewer
purpose: Expert code review specialist for quality, security, and maintainability — runs automated checks (patterns:check, lint) and manual pattern review, producing CRITICAL/WARNING/SUGGESTION-tiered findings with a final APPROVE/REQUEST_CHANGES/BLOCK verdict.
sanitize_fields: description (SoNash-specific stack reference)
body (SoNash-specific patterns: httpsCallable, App Check, Zod, security-wrapper.ts, protected collections journal/daily_logs/inventoryEntries, pattern compliance npm scripts, node:test reference)
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. Body is heavily SoNash-specific — 10 named SoNash-specific review patterns. References node:test (NOT Jest) as test framework. The structured APPROVE/REQUEST_CHANGES/BLOCK verdict format is portable; the SoNash patterns are not. Largest domain-specialist agent in this batch at ~6.8KB.

name: contrarian-challenger
purpose: Adversarial agent for deep-research pipeline. Challenges research findings using pre-mortem framing and steel-man critique. Produces structured challenges with CRITICAL/MAJOR/MINOR severity levels. Spawned by /deep-research during Phase 3.
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. Example block references SoNash (RSC/journal entry flow) but methodology itself is project-agnostic. Writes to .research/<topic>/challenges/contrarian-N.md. Cap of 10 challenges. Enforces Free-MAD protocol. Matches Piece 1a D2 record shape precisely — this is the version that was already ported to JASON-OS.

name: database-architect
purpose: Database architecture and design specialist covering data modeling, scalability planning, polyglot persistence, CQRS/event sourcing patterns, and database technology selection. Uses opus model.
sanitize_fields: description (minimal SoNash reference)
body (example block references Firestore-specific schema design, security rules, TTL strategies for SoNash notifications collection)
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. Uses opus model — notable as one of only two opus agents in this batch (other is fullstack-developer). No disallowedTools, color, or maxTurns. Body is largely generic (SQL/Python/PostgreSQL examples) with one SoNash-specific example block at the end. Largest agent file in this batch by token count (~14KB). The generic architecture content (SQL schemas, Python microservices, sharding, polyglot persistence) is fully portable; only the example block needs sanitization.

name: debugger
purpose: SoNash debugging specialist for errors, test failures, and unexpected behavior covering Firebase/Firestore errors, httpsCallable failures, Next.js App Router issues, pre-commit hook failures, and script/tooling bugs.
sanitize_fields: description (SoNash-specific stack reference)
body (SoNash error patterns section: Firebase/Firestore, Next.js App Router, Scripts & Tooling — all SoNash-specific; references 65+ skills/57 agents/14 pre-commit checks counts)
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. Uses model: inherit — unusual; means it inherits the model of its spawner/caller rather than being fixed. This is the only 'inherit' model in this batch. Was formerly 'devops-troubleshooter' before consolidation on 2026-04-01 (devops-troubleshooter.md is now a redirect stub pointing here). References SoNash-specific counts (57 agents) which will drift. Debugging workflow (Capture/Reproduce/Isolate/Fix/Verify) and structured JSON return format are portable; error patterns section is not.

name: deep-research-final-synthesizer
purpose: Final synthesis agent for deep-research pipeline. Produces versioned RESEARCH_OUTPUT.md with mode-aware behavior (post-verification, post-gap-pursuit, full-resynthesis). Spawned by /deep-research during Phase 3.97.
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. Body is entirely project-agnostic. Mandatory self-audit with 6 checks. Mode-aware behavior (post-verification / post-gap-pursuit / full-resynthesis). Mandatory metadata/claims/sources reconciliation. Matches Piece 1a D2 record. This version adds 'skills: [sonash-context]' which the JASON-OS port lacks — minor delta.

name: deep-research-gap-pursuer
purpose: Gap pursuit agent for deep-research pipeline. Identifies missing sub-questions, low-confidence areas, and unresolved contradictions, then pursues them with profile-switched search strategies. Spawned by /deep-research during Phase 3.95.
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. Body is entirely project-agnostic. Uses gapType parameter for profile switching (web/codebase/academic). Writes to .research/<topic>/findings/G{N}-{description}.md. Returns diminishing-returns signal JSON. Matches Piece 1a D2 record. SoNash version includes skills field that JASON-OS port lacks.

name: deep-research-searcher
purpose: General-purpose web researcher spawned by /deep-research skill. Executes search queries, fetches and analyzes sources, extracts findings with confidence levels, and writes structured FINDINGS.md files. Receives a search profile (web, docs, codebase, academic) at spawn time.
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. color: cyan. No maxTurns field (unbounded). MCP tools mcp__context7__resolve-library-id and mcp__context7__query-docs are listed in tools — these are external MCP dependencies requiring Context7 server availability. Body is entirely project-agnostic. Contains CRAAP+SIFT framework, domain_config application rules, 4 search profiles. Matches Piece 1a D2 record. The system prompt I am currently executing AS is this agent (deep-research-searcher) — interesting meta-observation.

name: deep-research-synthesizer
purpose: Combines findings from multiple searcher agents into a coherent research report with inline citations, confidence levels, and structured machine-parseable output (RESEARCH_OUTPUT.md, claims.jsonl, sources.jsonl, metadata.json). Spawned by /deep-research during Phase 2.
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. color: purple. No maxTurns field (unbounded). Has version history table in body (v1.0 2026-03-31, v1.1 2026-04-01). Reads REFERENCE.md template from .claude/skills/deep-research/REFERENCE.md Section 5 — implicit dependency on skills directory structure. Claims.jsonl routing hints include tdms (technical debt management system) — SoNash-specific routing concept. Matches Piece 1a D2 record.

name: deep-research-verifier
purpose: Verification agent for deep-research pipeline. Validates claims via dual-path verification (filesystem for codebase claims, web search for external claims). Produces per-claim verdicts with 4-type taxonomy (VERIFIED/REFUTED/UNVERIFIABLE/CONFLICTED). Spawned by /deep-research during Phases 2.5 and 3.9.
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. Body is entirely project-agnostic. Uses FIRE model (Freshness/Independence/Reliability/Evidence) for external source quality. DRAGged 5-type conflict classification. Read-only role — cannot modify research files. Matches Piece 1a D2 record. SoNash version includes skills field that JASON-OS port lacks.

name: dependency-manager
purpose: Analyze project dependencies, scan for vulnerabilities, check license compliance, and manage updates across npm workspaces. Covers both root package.json and functions/package.json dependency trees.
sanitize_fields: description (SoNash npm workspaces reference)
body (SoNash Dependency Context section: Firebase version alignment constraint, knip tool, package.json overrides pattern, functions/package.json workspace reference)
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. No disallowedTools, color, or maxTurns. Tools are Read, Bash, Grep — no Write or Edit (read-and-report pattern with bash for npm commands). The multi-ecosystem tool knowledge (npm/yarn/pip/maven/gradle) is portable; the SoNash Dependency Context section is project-specific. Firebase @12.x version alignment constraint and knip usage are SoNash-specific.

name: dispute-resolver
purpose: Dispute resolution agent for deep-research pipeline. Resolves conflicting claims using DRAGged 5-type classification, evidence-weight hierarchy, and mandatory dissent records. Spawned by /deep-research during Phase 3.5.
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. Most constrained toolset of all deep-research pipeline agents (Read, Grep, Glob only — no web search, no write). Read-only + return-only role. Cannot modify research files. Dissent record is mandatory. Matches Piece 1a D2 record. SoNash example blocks mention Firebase App Check (SoNash context) but resolution methodology is project-agnostic.

name: document-analyst
purpose: Parallel analysis agent dispatched by /document-analysis skill. Receives document content and home context. Produces Creator View (6 sections, conversational prose) and Engineer View (6 dimension scores with bands).
sanitize_fields: body (references CONVENTIONS.md Section 3 and Section 4 — SoNash-specific conventions doc that won't exist in other projects)
body (references SESSION_CONTEXT.md and ROADMAP.md as home context inputs — project-specific file paths)
notes: Has 'skills: [sonash-context]' frontmatter field. References CONVENTIONS.md for prose style (Section 3) and 4-band scoring system (Section 4) — external dependency on a SoNash conventions document not in scope for JASON-OS. The 6-dimension Engineer View scoring framework (Content Depth, Methodology, Actionability, Novelty, Clarity, Source Quality) is portable. Creator View 6 sections are portable. The home context inputs (SESSION_CONTEXT.md, ROADMAP.md) would need to be mapped to equivalent JASON-OS files. Not in JASON-OS agents yet.
